XMLDB.COMMENT: Find images in the file storage and export, or restore/replace, them with metadata and naming rules.

TABLE.NAME: tool_imageextractor_job
TABLE.COMMENT: One image extraction job: its search criteria, naming rule and run state.

FIELD.NAME: jobtype
FIELD.COMMENT: Empty until an action is chosen (set explicitly on create), then extract or replace.

FIELD.NAME: criteria
FIELD.COMMENT: JSON-encoded search criteria, including any CSV-derived lists.

FIELD.NAME: replacemode
FIELD.COMMENT: Replace job: single, zip or restore.

FIELD.NAME: backup
FIELD.COMMENT: Replace job: keep a backup of each original so it can be restored.

FIELD.NAME: missingonly
FIELD.COMMENT: Replace job: only target files whose stored content is missing/unreadable.

FIELD.NAME: altmissing
FIELD.COMMENT: Only target images that are embedded in content via an img tag with an empty or missing alt attribute (accessibility audit).

FIELD.NAME: optimizemaxpx
FIELD.COMMENT: Replace job: longest-edge pixel cap applied to uploaded replacements before applying (0 = no optimization).

FIELD.NAME: optimizequality
FIELD.COMMENT: Replace job: JPEG/WebP re-encode quality used when optimizing replacements.

FIELD.NAME: metaauthor
FIELD.COMMENT: Metadata-only replace: new author to set on matched files (null/empty = leave unchanged).

FIELD.NAME: metalicense
FIELD.COMMENT: Metadata-only replace: new license shortname to set on matched files (null/empty = leave unchanged).

FIELD.NAME: volumesize
FIELD.COMMENT: Maximum size of each ZIP volume in bytes.

FIELD.NAME: progressstage
FIELD.COMMENT: Which background stage is reporting live progress (clear or match), null between stages.

FIELD.NAME: progressdone
FIELD.COMMENT: Files/items the current stage has processed so far.

FIELD.NAME: progresstotal
FIELD.COMMENT: Estimated total files/items for the current stage (denominator for the progress bar).

TABLE.NAME: tool_imageextractor_item
TABLE.COMMENT: One matched file in a job, with its resolved metadata and output name.

FIELD.NAME: author
FIELD.COMMENT: The matched file's recorded author, captured at match time for the export metadata.

FIELD.NAME: license
FIELD.COMMENT: The matched file's license shortname, captured at match time for the export metadata.

FIELD.NAME: imagewidth
FIELD.COMMENT: Image width in pixels, resolved when the file is packed (0 = unknown/not an image).

FIELD.NAME: imageheight
FIELD.COMMENT: Image height in pixels, resolved when the file is packed (0 = unknown/not an image).

FIELD.NAME: alttext
FIELD.COMMENT: The image's description (alt text) read from the HTML that embeds it; blank when not embedded or undescribed.

FIELD.NAME: replacementname
FIELD.COMMENT: Replace job: the replacement source used for this target.

FIELD.NAME: note
FIELD.COMMENT: Per-item outcome note.

TABLE.NAME: tool_imageextractor_volume
TABLE.COMMENT: One generated ZIP volume for a job.

TABLE.NAME: tool_imageextractor_upload
TABLE.COMMENT: A resumable chunked upload of a large replacement file, assembled server-side to bypass the per-request upload limit.

FIELD.NAME: token
FIELD.COMMENT: Random token identifying the upload session.

FIELD.NAME: userid
FIELD.COMMENT: The user who owns the upload session.

FIELD.NAME: jobid
FIELD.COMMENT: The replace job the assembled file will be applied to.

FIELD.NAME: filesize
FIELD.COMMENT: The full size the assembled file should reach.

FIELD.NAME: uploadedbytes
FIELD.COMMENT: Bytes received so far (the resume point).

FIELD.NAME: chunks
FIELD.COMMENT: Chunks stored so far.

TABLE.NAME: tool_imageextractor_htmlbackup
TABLE.COMMENT: Original HTML of a content field before an alt-text replace changed it, so the change can be undone.

FIELD.NAME: tablename
FIELD.COMMENT: The table whose HTML column was changed.

FIELD.NAME: columnname
FIELD.COMMENT: The HTML column that was changed.

FIELD.NAME: rowid
FIELD.COMMENT: The id of the row whose HTML column was changed.

FIELD.NAME: oldcontent
FIELD.COMMENT: The field's original HTML, captured before the first change in this job.
